THE 8/18/10 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS CONTINUED TO 8/19/10. THE 10/20/10 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS CONTINUED TO 10/21/10. THE 12/15/10 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS CONTINUED TO 12/16/10. RULING:
PLAINTIFF JANET QUENGA, JANICE HANCE, JOAQUIN QUENGA, JESSICA NANGAUTA, JOHN QUENGA, JEFFREY QUENGA MOTION For Order Consolidating Wrongful Death Cases
No opposition was made and tentative ruling adopted: Plaintiffs' motion for order consolidating wrongful death cases is granted. No opposition filed. Cases numbered 274982 and 274983 are consolidated. Henceforth, all papers shall be filed and served under lead case number 274982. Judge: Harold Kahn, Reporter: LaVena Ward, CSR # 7077 = (220/HEK)
